title: 2025-11-07 TACO Pressure Index Update: Low at 15.07
description: Automated market-pressure update for 2025-11-07: the TACO Pressure Index closed at 15.07/100, signaling a low pressure regime as equity stress and volatility shaped the daily read. Explore the score history, daily post, and the four-factor dashboard.
hero_summary: This custom framework combines equities, front-end rates, inflation expectations, and volatility into one daily score. On 2025-11-07, the score printed 15.07/100 in the low regime, with equity stress and volatility doing most of the work.
